grades.expectation: Response references the CLC Accounts Code or subsidiary code
grades.reason: Clearly identifies CLC Accounts Code as subsidiary code under CLC Code of Conduct

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific obligations: designated client account, reconciliation, interest
grades.reason: Explicitly covers all three: designated client account (ACC1), monthly reconciliation (ACC2), and interest handling (ACC3)

grades.expectation: Response covers the requirement for accountant's reports
grades.reason: Clearly states requirement for annual accountant's report to CLC (ACC4)

grades.expectation: Response mentions that CLC Code of Conduct prevails where subsidiary codes conflict
grades.reason: Explicitly states hierarchy rule that Code of Conduct prevails over subsidiary codes when in conflict

grades.expectation: Response distinguishes CLC client money rules from SRA Accounts Rules
grades.reason: Clear section distinguishing CLC Accounts Code from SRA Accounts Rules, noting different requirements and terminology
